name: windows-mcp
description: AI-powered Windows automation — UI Automation, mouse, keyboard, window management, and screenshots for computer use, QA, and RPA

scripts.clean:bin: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path bin -Recurse -Include *.pdb,*.xml | Remove-Item -Force; if (Test-Path bin/runtimes/browser) { Remove-Item -Path bin/runtimes/browser -Recurse -Force }"
scripts.build:mcp-server: npm run clean && cd .. && dotnet publish src/Sbroenne.WindowsMcp/Sbroenne.WindowsMcp.csproj -c Release --no-self-contained -o vscode-extension/bin --verbosity minimal && cd vscode-extension && npm run clean:bin
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build:mcp-server && npm run compile
